checks.describe: a raw LIST with limit=1 against kube-system ConfigMaps returns a non-empty continue token
spending the continue token fetches a second page (a ConfigMapList, not a 400 Status)
checks.run: CONT=$(kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core get --raw "/api/v1/namespaces/kube-system/configmaps?limit=1" | grep -o '"continue":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4); kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core get --raw "/api/v1/namespaces/kube-system/configmaps?limit=1&continue=${CONT}"

checks.describe: the APF debug endpoint answers with the default priority level names
a bounded raw watch with allowWatchBookmarks=true receives a BOOKMARK event before the server closes it
checks.run: RV=$(kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core get configmaps -n default -o jsonpath='{.metadata.resourceVersion}'); kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core get --raw "/api/v1/namespaces/default/configmaps?watch=1&allowWatchBookmarks=true&resourceVersion=${RV}&timeoutSeconds=10"
